friendly_name: Charter Ownership Consolidation and Neutrality Hardening
source_description: Pre-Phase-3 cleanup tranche bundling #611 (consolidate charter ownership into src/charter with hybrid-with-sunset shims in specify_cli.charter) and #653 narrow scope (finish neutrality hardening with content-lint + path-allowlist regression tripwires). Defers new language profiles and styleguide extraction.
